questions.question: How do I earn points?
questions.answer: You can earn points by completing quests on the 'Quests' page! Just start a quest, submit your proof, and wait for a moderator to approve it.

questions.question: How long does it take to review my submission?
questions.answer: Our moderators usually review submissions within 24 hours. You can check the status on your 'My Submissions' page.

questions.question: Where can I see my claimed rewards?
questions.answer: You can see all your claimed rewards on the 'My Rewards' page, which is in the main navigation menu.
